name: WorkArena++
short_description: Per-source tag for tasks and assets sourced from the WorkArena++ web-task benchmark.
detailed_description: Tags annotation, experiment, and analysis work that operates on WorkArena++ episodes. WorkArena++ contributes mid-level subtask-planning material to the composite benchmark. Use this category for stratified per-source breakdowns and for filtering datasets, models, and predictions that originate from WorkArena++ runs.
